notFound.title: Oops... This otter got lost at sea.
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved. You can still head back somewhere safe.

server.title: Oops... The sea is a little rough right now.
server.description: A temporary error is preventing the website from responding properly. Try again in a moment or head back to the home page.

fallback.title: Page unavailable
fallback.description: Fallback version. Try the French or English homepage.
